arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer 'decision' amid Arne Slot Liverpool update
arts.sum: The future of Trent Alexander-Arnold at Liverpool continues to be a daily topic as his contract is coming to an end next summer

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: suffer ANOTHER Alexander-Arnold contract headache
arts.sum: Liverpool face another headache in their quest to keep Trent Alexander-Arnold as Barcelona and Bayern Munich have joined Real Madrid in the race to sign the player who's out of contract in the summer. Reports in Spain have suggested that Real Madrid have all but clinched the deal and he will be another world-class free agent to come in, following on from Kylian Mbappe last season.

arts.ttl: Slot compares Liverpool midfielder to Declan Rice
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has said he has been surprised by how ‘comfortable’ Ryan Gravenberch has been since being moved into a defensive midfield role. Gravenberch has been one of the surprise packages of the campaign after shining for Liverpool at the base of Slot’s midfield. The Dutchman endured an underwhelming debut season in the […] The post Slot compares Liverpool midfielder to Declan Rice first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool line up Barcelona defender as Trent replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are ready to submit a summer bid of €50m (£41.7m) to sign Barcelona’s Jules Kounde. Arne Slot’s side are scouring Europe for potential replacements for Trent Alexander-Arnold, who is out of contract at the end of the season and attracting interest from Real Madrid. arts.ttl: Arsenal problems escalate as four key players could miss Liverpool showdown
arts.sum: The Gunners were beaten 2-0 by Bournemouth and could be without a plethora of first-team players when the Reds visit next weekend

arts.ttl: Two key Chelsea players out of Liverpool match with late fitness decision imminent
arts.sum: Reece James has been sidelined since the opening day of the season but is now fit to return for Chelsea's trip to Liverpool on Sunday
